'''fanoto''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:roadlessness|roadlessness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-n-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:roadlessness|roadlessness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| fanoto
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæneteth|fæneteth]] || [[word:fænetej|fænetej]] || [[word:fænetesh|fænetesh]] || [[word:fænete|fænete]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fanonototh|fanonototh]] || [[word:fanonotoj|fanonotoj]] || [[word:fanonotosh|fanonotosh]] || [[word:fanonoto|fanonoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fanototh|fanototh]] || [[word:fanotoj|fanotoj]] || [[word:fanotosh|fanotosh]] || [[word:fanoto|fanoto]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fanoftoth|fanoftoth]] || [[word:fanoftoj|fanoftoj]] || [[word:fanoftosh|fanoftosh]] || [[word:fanoftof|fanoftof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fanototho|fanototho]] || [[word:fanotojo|fanotojo]] || [[word:fanotosho|fanotosho]] || [[word:fanotoko|fanotoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fanototh|fanototh]] || [[word:fanotoj|fanotoj]] || [[word:fanotosh|fanotosh]] || [[word:fanoto|fanoto]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fanotothol|fanotothol]] || [[word:fanotojol|fanotojol]] || [[word:fanotoshol|fanotoshol]] || [[word:fanotokol|fanotokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fanotothotho|fanotothotho]] || [[word:fanotojojo|fanotojojo]] || [[word:fanotoshosho|fanotoshosho]] || [[word:fanotoko|fanotoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fanotothon|fanotothon]] || [[word:fanotojon|fanotojon]] || [[word:fanotoshon|fanotoshon]] || [[word:fanotokon|fanotokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fanotothoro|fanotothoro]] || [[word:fanotojoro|fanotojoro]] || [[word:fanotoshoro|fanotoshoro]] || [[word:fanotokoro|fanotokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
